allow: Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); mysql.createConnection\({host:'192.168.31.47',port:3306,user:'root',password:'66666666'}\).then\(c=>c.query\('CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS paseo_relay'\)\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('OK'\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) if f['type']=='file']")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) if 'screen' in f['name'].lower\(\) or 'cap' in f['name'].lower\(\) or f['name'].endswith\(\('.png','.jpg','.jpeg'\)\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(c['sha'][:7], c['commit']['message'][:60], c['commit']['author']['date'][:19]\) for c in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)]")
